svg.title: CXSAMAA Infrastructure Roadmap
svg.desc: Three-phase infrastructure roadmap for CXSAMAA AI: Setup, Deploy, Harden
svg.text: Day 1 — create all accounts before writing a single line

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up Vercel for CXSAMAA frontend?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Neon Postgres for CXSAMAA?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Upstash Redis for Celery?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Cloudflare R2 for audio storage?')
sendPrompt('How do I provision an Oracle Always Free VM?')
g.text: Always Free Ampere — API server + Celery workers

svg.text: Day 2–3 — SSH into Oracle and ship

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should my Dockerfile look like for CXSAMAA FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('What should my docker-compose.prod.yml look like for CXSAMAA?')
sendPrompt('What environment variables does CXSAMAA need in .env?')
sendPrompt('What is the exact deploy command for CXSAMAA on Oracle?')
sendPrompt('How do I verify CXSAMAA is running correctly after deploy?')
g.text: curl /health · check Neon connection · upload test audio to R2

svg.text: Week 1–2 — add these before showing to customers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up nginx SSL for CXSAMAA on Oracle?')
sendPrompt('How do I enable PgBouncer on Neon for CXSAMAA?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up SSE for live dashboard updates in CXSAMAA?')
sendPrompt('What monitoring should I set up for CXSAMAA on Oracle?')
sendPrompt('How should I back up my CXSAMAA infrastructure config?')
sendPrompt('How do I prepare a migration plan from Oracle to Hetzner for CXSAMAA?')
sendPrompt('What is the estimated monthly cost for CXSAMAA infrastructure?')
g.text: ~$0/mo infra · costs start with Deepgram / AssemblyAI API usage
